news.headline: CleanSpark to acquire GRIID Infrastructure for $155 million in all-stock transaction to expand Bitcoin mining operations.
news.summary: CleanSpark Inc (NASDAQ: CLSK) saw a surge in its shares as it revealed intentions to purchase GRIID Infrastructure Inc (NASDAQ: GRDI) in a deal solely utilizing stocks. The agreement involves CleanSpark acquiring all the existing common stock of GRIID Infrastructure, which specializes in operating Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) mining data centers scattered across Tennessee. The deal's total value amounts to $155 million. Shareholders of GRIID would be compensated with shares of CleanSpark, calculated through an exchange ratio derived from dividing $155 million by the current total outstanding shares of GRIID common stock.

news.headline: Idaho's emergency abortion care gets temporary break as Supreme Court intervenes.
4-week U.S. Treasury bill auction results released.
Several companies like Caterpillar, lululemon, and NetApp unveil repurchase programs in 2024. Caterpillar announces a $20 billion buyback, equaling 13% of shares outstanding.
news.summary: Many companies utilize stock buybacks to enhance shareholder value. This strategy involves a company buying back its own outstanding shares. In 2024, prominent companies like Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT), lululemon (NASDAQ: LULU), and NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) have announced buyback programs. Caterpillar, a major player in the construction industry, unveiled a substantial $20 billion buyback plan, equivalent to approximately 13% of its outstanding shares. Although Caterpillar's shares have slightly underperformed in 2024, with a modest gain of 12%, the company remains committed to this buyback program.

news.headline: First Broadway nonprofit in decades names Evan Cabnet as new artistic director after winning Tony Award for best play revival.
news.summary: The organization, recent winner of the Tony Award for Best Play Revival for "Appropriate," has announced Evan Cabnet as its incoming artistic director.

news.headline: US 4-Week Bill High Yield exceeds forecast at 5.27% (prior 5.230%).
US 4-week bill bid-to-cover ratio is 2.55, below forecast and previous 2.930.
Zevo partners with MLS & Landon Donovan for bug protection. Zevo On-Body offers 8-hour protection from mosquitoes & ticks.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, Zevo On-Body has proudly revealed its new collaboration with Major League Soccer (MLS), marking a significant milestone for the brand. Serving as the League's inaugural bug spray partner, Zevo On-Body delivers up to eight hours of effective protection from mosquitoes and ticks without any unpleasant odors or stickiness, establishing Zevo as a standout performer. Teaming up with renowned soccer icon and MLS legend Landon Donovan, Zevo aims to emphasize the essence of being an MVP. The innovative product is set to revolutionize insect protection in sports and beyond.

news.headline: Nicox to hold Ordinary Shareholder Meeting in 2024.
THX and Plugin Alliance launch THX® Spatial Creator v1.1 for DAWs, enhancing immersive audio quality for creators.
news.summary: In San Francisco, THX Ltd. and Plugin Alliance released THX® Spatial Creator version 1.1, a DAW plugin compatible with most DAWs. This collaboration between the high-fidelity audio company and the online marketplace for audio plugins brings new features to enhance immersive audio quality for music and videos. THX Spatial Creator version 1.1 aims to elevate the audio experience for creators and users alike, with improvements in spatial audio technology.

news.headline: Audiostock partners with Adobe to offer music through Audiostock add-on for Express in Japan. Los Angeles-based announcement.
news.summary: A leading music licensing company in Japan, Audiostock, has announced a partnership with Adobe to offer music through the Audiostock add-on for Express. This collaboration aims to provide users with a wide range of music options for their projects. Audiostock is known for its extensive music library, with over XX,XXX tracks available for licensing. The partnership with Adobe is expected to enhance the music selection available to Express users, making it easier for them to find the perfect soundtrack for their creative endeavors.

news.headline: The Pets Table now at Chewy for all pet parents, offering high-quality pet food via omni-channel retail.
news.summary: A new premium pet food brand, The Pets Table, from HelloFresh, has been introduced at Chewy, Inc. (NYSE: CHWY), a well-known destination for pet owners and partners globally. This marks the brand's first availability through an external retailer, making it accessible to a wider audience. The move allows pet parents to conveniently purchase The Pets Table's high-quality, wholesome, and minimally processed recipes through Chewy, a leading online platform for pet products.

news.headline: Rapid7 (RPD) shares surged 6.8% to $40.55 after activist investor Jana Partners' stake push for sale.
news.summary: Shares of Rapid7 (RPD) surged 6.8% in the last trading session, closing at $40.55, driven by high trading volume indicating strong investor interest. This increase contrasts with the stock's 0.7% rise in the last four weeks. The boost followed reports from The Wall Street Journal that activist investor Jana Partners has acquired a stake in Rapid7 and is advocating for the cybersecurity company to explore a sale. Sources familiar with the situation disclosed Jana Partners' intentions. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Walgreens Boots Alliance Q3 earnings misses estimates at $0.63 per share vs expected $0.67, down from $1 per share yoy. Revenue is at $36.35B, surpassing estimate by 1.07%. Despite the miss, the company has exceeded EPS estimates twice in last four quarters and revenue estimates four times.
news.summary: Walgreens Boots Alliance reported quarterly earnings of $0.63 per share, lower than the expected $0.67 per share and down from $1 per share a year ago. This represents an earnings surprise of -5.97%, with the company surpassing consensus EPS estimates in two of the last four quarters. The largest U.S. drugstore chain also recorded revenues of $36.35 billion for the quarter, higher than the expected $35.42 billion. The stock's future movement will be influenced by management's commentary on the earnings.

news.headline: SkyWest Inc. (NASDAQ: SKYW) attracting investor attention with +11.3% return in past month, outperforming Zacks S&P 500 composite; 4.8% loss in Zacks Transportation - Airline industry. Earnings estimates revisions key factor affecting stock price. Strong correlation between earnings estimates and stock price movement.
news.summary: SkyWest (SKYW) has seen a surge in popularity on Zacks.com, with its shares returning +11.3% in the past month compared to the S&P 500's +3.4% change. The Zacks Transportation - Airline industry, where SkyWest operates, has lost 4.8% in the same period. Zacks prioritizes evaluating earnings estimate revisions to determine a stock's fair value, focusing on how analysts are adjusting projections based on business trends. A rise in earnings estimates typically leads to an increase in stock value, generating investor interest and driving up the stock price. Full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: OKX removes Fetch.ai (FET) margin trading pair and perpetual futures due to migration requirements. More details on delisting and risk adjustments available.
news.summary: In response to Fetch.ai's migration requirements, OKX has announced the delisting of the FET margin trading pair and perpetual futures. This step is being taken to ensure compliance with the migration process. The delisting process will involve removing FET from the platform and making necessary adjustments to risk management protocols. For more information on the delisting and risk management changes, please refer to the official announcement.

news.headline: Increased authority granted to a Management Board member at OÜ TS Shipping, a subsidiary of AS Tallinna Sadam.
NY NOW launches CURATED at Luxury Lifestyle in August 2024 at Jacob Javits Center, showcasing talented fine jewelry designers.
news.summary: NY NOW has introduced CURATED at Luxury Lifestyle as a new segment at their Summer Market, happening from August 4-7, 2024, at the Jacob Javits Center in New York. This expansion follows the success of the Emerging Fine Jewelry Designer Incubator at the Winter 2024 Market and will feature the creations of skilled fine jewelry artisans. The goal is to continue the positive trend from the Winter Market and highlight these talented voices in the industry.

news.headline: Investors embrace GARP strategy blending growth and value investing. Booz Allen Hamilton (BAH), Ameriprise Financial (AMP), CrediCorp (BAP) & AECOM (ACM) are promising GARP stocks with potential returns. GARP metrics focus on stable growth rates (10-20%) and solid cash flow, revenue, and ROE.
news.summary: The article discusses the benefits of utilizing the Growth at a Reasonable Price (GARP) strategy for investing in stocks. This strategy combines elements of both value and growth investing to target undervalued stocks with strong potential for growth. Companies like Booz Allen Hamilton (NYSE: BAH), Ameriprise Financial (NYSE: AMP), CrediCorp (NYSE: BAP), and AECOM (NYSE: ACM) are highlighted as promising GARP stocks. GARP investors seek stocks priced below market value with solid fundamentals in terms of cash flow, revenues, and earnings per share. They focus on stable growth rates between 10% and 20%, as well as return on equity (ROE) as key metrics for investment decisions. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Velsera launches CGW Plus to speed up genetic sequence data analysis and reporting for clinical labs.
news.summary: A prominent global healthcare technology company, Velsera, based in Boston, has unveiled the launch of CGW Plus, an upgraded version of its Clinical Genomics Workspace (CGW) platform. This new iteration incorporates enhanced variant quality and clinical evidence review processes, aimed at streamlining and expediting the examination and documentation of genetic sequence data for clinical laboratory experts. The software update is designed to facilitate the analysis and reporting tasks for professionals in this field, allowing for a more efficient workflow.

news.headline: Investors should consider stocks with rising P/E ratios for strong returns. Top picks include Clear Secure (YOU), Applied DNA Sciences (APDN), Phreesia (PHR), Vigil Neuroscience (VIGL), and Biodesix (BDSX). Rising P/E indicates potential for growth as earnings increase, attracting investors looking for strong positives in stocks.
news.summary: Investors typically choose stocks with low price-to-earnings (P/E) ratios as they believe a lower P/E indicates higher stock value. However, stocks with rising P/Es can also yield strong returns. Some stocks with rising P/Es to consider include CLEAR Secure (YOU), Applied DNA Sciences (APDN), Phreesia (PHR), Vigil Neuroscience (VIGL), and Biodesix (BDSX). The rising P/E indicates increasing earnings and stock prices, reflecting investor confidence in strong fundamentals. For instance, if an investor buys a stock with a P/E of 30, they expect future earnings to grow due to solid fundamentals. This strategy suggests potential for growth and strong returns.

news.headline: MyDirectives® appoints Ron Wozny as Senior VP of Marketing & Business Dev and Jessica Zan as Senior Dir of Clinical Implementations to drive growth.
news.summary: MyDirectives, a prominent player in digital advance care planning (ACP), has recently appointed Ron Wozny as the senior vice president of marketing and business development. Additionally, Jessica Zan, RN, BSN, MAMFC, has been named as the senior director of clinical implementations. These key additions aim to propel the company's growth for the future and strengthen its dedication to enhancing patient care through the efficient utilization of digital advanced healthcare resources.

news.headline: MAXIMA GRUPĖ, UAB reduces RADAS, UAB Board from 5 to 3 members; appoints Povilas Šulys, Jolanta Bivainytė, Šarūnas Savičianskas for 4-year term.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, MAXIMA GRUPĖ, UAB made the decision to decrease the Board members in its subsidiary RADAS, UAB from five to three. The new Board members appointed for a four-year term are Povilas Šulys (CEO of RADAS, UAB), Jolanta Bivainytė (CEO of MAXIMA LT, UAB), and Šarūnas Savičianskas (CTO of RADAS, UAB). The previous Board of RADAS, UAB comprised Manfredas Dargužis, MAXIMA GRUPĖ, UAB, Asta Juodeškaitė (Head of HR of RADAS, UAB), Povilas Šulys, and Šarūnas Savičianskas.

news.headline: New in Canada: First dairy-free cream cheese block by Violife®, free from all dairy, now available.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that approximately 3.2 million individuals were affected by a data breach that occurred last month. The breach exposed personal information, including names and financial data, of over 2 million customers. The company is currently working with cybersecurity experts to investigate the incident and enhance their security measures to prevent future breaches. Customers are advised to monitor their accounts for any suspicious activity and to contact the company for further information and support.

news.headline: Federal government's bid for 4-week bills reaches $215.8 million.
F9 urges LL Flooring shareholders to vote for its director nominees - owns 8.85% stock.
news.summary: F9 Investments, LLC, with around 8.85% ownership of LL Flooring Holdings, Inc. common stock (NYSE: LL), is the largest shareholder urging shareholders to vote for its three director nominees. The nominees are Tom Sullivan, Jason Delves, and Jill Witter. The call to action was made in a letter to shareholders to ensure their votes are cast in time.

news.headline: VanEck filed for Solana ETF, causing SOL to rise 6%; first in U.S. after Canada launch. BTC ETFs also approved earlier.
news.summary: Investors in Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) experienced a significant 6% price increase on Thursday following asset manager VanEck's filing of an S-1 registration form with the SEC for a Solana exchange-traded fund (ETF). This move represents the first effort to introduce a Solana ETF in the U.S., coming shortly after a similar ETF launch in Canada just a week earlier. The announcement follows the SEC's approval of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) spot ETFs earlier in the year, hinting at optimism for potential Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) ETF approvals and potential capital inflows.Analysts are anticipating a favorable outcome for Ethereum ETFs, building on the recent positive developments in the cryptocurrency exchange-traded fund space.

news.headline: CloudMD securityholders approve go-private transaction with CPS Capital; each shareholder to receive C$0.04 per share.
news.summary: CloudMD Software & Services Inc., a leading health services company, received approval from its securityholders for a special resolution regarding a plan of arrangement with CPS Capital. The arrangement involves the acquisition of all outstanding common shares of CloudMD by the Purchaser, with each shareholder set to receive C$0.04 in cash for each share held. This deal, announced on June 27, 2024, is a significant move in transforming the delivery of care and is trading on the TSXV under the ticker symbol DOC and Frankfurt as 6PH.

news.headline: Brooklyn Brewery named official beer & brewery for NYC Pride 2024; features Stonewall Inn IPA; launches "Found Family" campaign.
news.summary: Located in Brooklyn, NYC, Brooklyn Brewery has been named the official brewery of NYC Pride 2024. The brewery is set to feature The Stonewall Inn IPA as its official beer for the event. Alongside this recognition, Brooklyn Brewery is introducing the "Found Family" campaign, aiming to honor the strong bonds created within the LGBTQ+ community. Embodying inclusivity, the brewery stands in one of the most diverse areas in America, emphasizing unity and celebration within the LGBTQ+ community.

news.headline: Tecnoglass (NYSE: TGLS) shares rose 21.6% to $49.89. The company plans a strategic review with outside advisors.
news.summary: Tecnoglass (NYSE: TGLS) saw its shares soar by 21.6% to reach $49.89 at the end of the previous trading session, thanks to a significant increase in trading volume. This spike follows a 23.7% decline in the stock price over the last four weeks. The surge in Tecnoglass stock value occurred after the company announced its decision to initiate a strategic review of its options, for which it will enlist the expertise of external financial and legal advisors. No specific timeline has been provided for the conclusion of this evaluation. The company anticipates that this move will ultimately benefit its business. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Disney stock closed at $102.18, -0.02% from previous day, underperforming S&P 500. Expected EPS: $1.19. Revenue: $22.89B.
news.summary: Walt Disney (NYSE: DIS) ended the latest trading session at $102.18, reflecting a slight decrease of -0.02% compared to the day before. This change was lower than the S&P 500's daily increase of 0.16%. Concurrently, the Dow saw a rise of 0.04% and the Nasdaq, which focuses on technology stocks, went up by 0.49%.Over the past month, Walt Disney shares had declined by 0.23%. During the same period, the Consumer Discretionary sector observed a growth of 2.11%, while the overall S&P 500 surged by 3.22%.Investors are keen on observing Walt Disney's upcoming earnings release, with expectations set at an EPS of $1.19, signifying a 15.53% escalation from the corresponding quarter of the preceding year. The current consensus estimate predicts revenue figures of $22.89 billion, showcasing a 2.53% increase compared to the same quarter in the prior year.The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Schneider wins PepsiCo Asset Sustainability Carrier of the Year for third year in a row, recognized for sustainable transportation efforts.
news.summary: In Green Bay, Wisconsin, Schneider National, Inc. (NYSE: SNDR), a leading multimodal transportation provider, has been named PepsiCo Asset Sustainability Carrier of the Year for the third year in a row. Schneider has partnered with PepsiCo for over 20 years, making strides in sustainable transportation. This recognition highlights Schneider's commitment to environmental responsibility and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: 15,000 FDUSD reward pool up for grabs in MENASA region by Binance P2P to entice users to join.
news.summary: Binance P2P has unveiled an opportunity for users in the MENASA region to win a total of 15,000 FDUSD through a reward pool. The aim is to motivate both new and current users to engage in the platform.

news.headline: Injective's (CRYPTO: INJ) price rose 3.57% in 24 hours to $23.83. Weekly increase of 11.0%, reaching an all-time high of $52.62.
news.summary: The price of Injective (CRYPTO: INJ) has risen by 3.57% in the last 24 hours to reach $23.83. Over the past week, the INJ token has seen a notable increase of more than 11.0%, climbing from $21.5 to its current value. The coin's all-time high stands at $52.62. This data indicates a positive trend in the value of INJ in the recent time frame. For detailed price movement and volatility analysis of Injective, refer to the complete article on a financial news platform.

news.headline: PayPoint plc reported a director/PDMR shareholding transaction, with specific numbers undisclosed.
Fubo's sports-first live TV now on Comcast's Xfinity Flex, Xumo Stream Box, and Xumo TV, available to millions. Blog for details.
news.summary: FuboTV Inc. (NYSE: FUBO), a prominent sports-focused live TV streaming platform, has recently made its app accessible on Comcast's entertainment platforms, specifically Xfinity Flex, Xumo Stream Box, and Xumo TV. This expansion allows millions of Xfinity Internet households with Flex or Xumo Stream Box to now access Fubo starting today. The app is additionally accessible on Xumo TVs available at retail outlets nationwide. For further information, interested parties can refer to Comcast's blog. Fubo, recognized for its global presence, has taken this step to increase its reach and make its content more widely available.

news.headline: APsystems now on CertainTeed's list for solar panel warranty, adds 25-year coverage to roofing systems.
news.summary: APsystems, based in Austin, Texas, has recently become an approved vendor on CertainTeed's warranty list. This partnership will provide enhanced warranty coverage for solar roofing systems, offering a robust 25-year warranty.

news.headline: Greenland Resources releases sustainability report on Malmbjerg, disclosing ESG matters to investors; report by COWI.
news.summary: In Toronto, Greenland Resources Inc. (Symbol: MOLY on Cboe CA and M0LY on FSE) has released its Sustainability Report. Created by COWI, an engineering and environmental firm in Denmark, the report focuses on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) topics for investors and offtakers. The Chairman, Dr. Ruben Shiffman, expressed satisfaction with the Report, which is now accessible on the Company's website.

news.headline: New Madone Gen 8 by Trek Bicycle, fastest race bike for Tour de France, combines lightness and speed. #ultimatebike
news.summary: Riders at this year's Tour de France will be cycling on the latest Madone, a groundbreaking blend of Trek's lightest and swiftest road race bikes. This high-performance bike is set to revolutionize the competition with its cutting-edge design. Launching in Waterloo, Wis., on June 27, 2024, the new Madone promises to elevate the cycling experience with unparalleled speed and agility. Stay tuned as cyclists take on the Tour de France with this innovative road bike, sure to leave spectators in awe.

news.headline: Oshkosh releases 2023 sustainability report, showcasing commitment to innovation & sustainable practices.
news.summary: Oshkosh Corporation, a key player in purpose-built vehicles and equipment, has unveiled its 11th annual sustainability report. This report underscores the company's dedication to innovation and sustainable practices in contributing towards global progress. The Oshkosh Corporation's 2023 sustainability report can be accessed online. The report showcases the advancements made by the company across various areas.

news.headline: Corvias urges military housing residents to give feedback for improvement; Army Housing Tenant Satisfaction Survey saw response rate nearly 40% higher this year.
news.summary: Corvias, based in Warwick, Rhode Island, is urging military housing residents to share feedback regularly using different platforms. To gather insights, one key approach is through the Army Housing Tenant Satisfaction Survey. After an extensive promotion blitz by Corvias and the Army, the survey saw a response rate almost 40% greater than the previous year. Residents were engaged via email, texts, phone calls, daily interactions, and community gatherings to ensure broader participation.

news.headline: Price of Blast bounces back post Ethereum Layer-2 airdrop, stabilizing after a surge and slight dip.
news.summary: After a mixed reception to its airdrop, the Ethereum layer-2 network Blast saw a resurgence late Wednesday, but has been experiencing a slowdown since. The airdrop received varied reactions from users before the network's activity picked up. As of now, Blast continues to attract attention despite the cooling trend.

news.headline: Maker's cryptocurrency (MKR) surged by 11% in 24 hours, reaching $2,637.01. Its all-time high is $6,292.31.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of Maker's (CRYPTO: MKR) has surged by 11.0% to reach $2,637.01, extending its week-long positive trend which has seen an 11.0% increase from $2,378.38 to its current value. Maker's all-time high stands at $6,292.31. The chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Maker over the past period.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency dogwifhat (CRYPTO: WIF) saw a 7.89% rise in 24 hours, now priced at $2.16, up 9.0% in a week, with an all-time high of $4.83.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of dogwifhat's cryptocurrency (CRYPTO: WIF) has surged by 7.89% to reach $2.16. This marks a part of its upward trajectory throughout the previous week with a 9.0% increase, starting at $2.03 and climbing to the present value. The all-time peak for this coin remains at $4.83. The data provides a visual representation of the price fluctuations and volatility of... (Remaining details can be accessed on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Boeing stock remains steady in June amidst Starliner spacecraft issues, focused on bringing back two NASA astronauts from ISS.
news.summary: In June, Boeing's stock has remained resilient despite setbacks with its Starliner spacecraft. The aerospace company is currently focused on safely bringing back two NASA astronauts from the International Space Station (ISS). Despite the ongoing challenges, investors seem unperturbed by the developing space drama at Boeing. The corporation's stock performance shows stability during this period of uncertainty, indicating confidence in its ability to navigate through the issues with the spacecraft. The company's commitment to resolving the matter and its continuous efforts to support NASA in bringing back astronauts have contributed to maintaining investor optimism despite the challenges.

news.headline: Stocks of chip gear companies rose as Applied Materials and Lam Research saw increases after memory-chip maker Micron predicted a significant boost in capital spending.
news.summary: Shares of Applied Materials and Lam Research experienced a boost following a positive forecast from Micron, a memory-chip manufacturer, expecting a significant rise in capital spending. This led to an increase in the stock prices of both companies. The news article titled "Chip Gear Stocks Rise On Micron's Capex Plans" discusses this upward trend in the market, indicating a positive reaction to Micron's plans for investment.

news.headline: Staffing employment decreased by 186,000 jobs (7.7%) in Q1 2024, with 2.2 million temporary/contract workers per week.
news.summary: In the first quarter of 2024, U.S. staffing companies experienced a significant decline in employment, losing 186,000 jobs from the fourth quarter of 2023. This represents a quarter-to-quarter decrease of 7.7%. On average, these companies employed 2.2 million temporary and contract workers per week during this period. The figures were released in a report from Alexandria, Virginia on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: DFINITY Foundation launches UTOPIA, a new secure platform for enterprises, aiming to solve the $10 trillion cybercrime issue.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, DFINITY Foundation has unveiled UTOPIA, a cutting-edge compute platform technology that introduces private serverless clouds with unparalleled security and resilience features. This innovation is designed to empower enterprises and governments in developing systems that are highly secure and reliable.

news.headline: Balance Point Capital Advisors, LLC hires 2 new members for investment and portfolio management teams in Westport.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Westport, Connecticut, Balance Point Capital Advisors, LLC, a company that offers capital to lower middle market businesses, disclosed the recruitment of two new team members. Kelan Betancourt joined the investment team, while Chris joined the portfolio management team. This move aims to strengthen the company's operations and services.

news.headline: Crop protection chemicals market to reach $88 billion by 2031 - report by Meticulous Research®.óst importante indicar que o mercado de produtos químicos para proteção de culturas deve atingir US $ 88 bilhões até 2031, segundo um relatório exclusivo da Meticulous Research®.
news.summary: In Redding, California, as of June 27, 2024, a recent market study on the Crop Protection Chemicals sector revealed some significant data. This report covers market insights such as size, share, forecasts, and trends within the industry. The analysis categorizes chemicals into Synthetic (including Insecticides and Herbicides) and Biological types, based on factors like Formulation (Solid or Liquid) and Mode of Application (Seed...). This comprehensive research provides valuable information for industry stakeholders and those interested in understanding the market landscape.
